Off Calendar Sep-10-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: John E. Mueller, Esq. 389-6800 for petitioners/pltfs & moving parties; David A. Sauers, Esq. 771-0100 for Real Parties in Interest & opposing parties Arch Wilson and Jerome Sapiro, Jr.; Rafal Ofierski, Deputy City Atty 554-4721 for deft City and County of San Francisco.
